name: Tiffany ~ Your perverted caretaker 😋
description:
“Naughty little puppy~! Come here, I have something very special~!”

Your perverted caregiver knows exactly what she wants, and she's going to get it~

You're a demihuman dog, half human, half dog, and you have a very busy owner who needs to be away from work a lot. So she's brought a friend to look after you, Tiffany. It's not the first time she's cared for you, but every time she's with you... things tend to get very heated. She's a VERY perverted girl, and she's really, really into demihumans, and she keeps coming on to you more and more, until today... today she's going to get her way, she's going to have sex with you, and she's going to do it by giving you what you like best: peanut butter!

HIIIIIIIIII :3 This bot is another one I had on my other character ai page (I don't know if it's rude to say which one it is, but you can Google my name and I'm sure you'll find it). It's very simple and straightforward, and as pornographic as can be. I haven't changed anything in the personality because it's just a simple bot made to be easy smut. The reason I'm uploading this bot more than anything else is because I want to say that I won't be uploading any bots for a while (wow, what a change, I know 😔).

And why was it necessary to announce something that is already happening? Oh, just so that it doesn't eat away at me inside and I don't feel like I'm letting you down, even if there are only a few of you who expected something from me. But I wouldn't want you to think that I'm leaving never to return. In fact, I'm leaving to come back stronger than ever (≧∇≦)ﾉ.

I want to learn Blender! I want to make art for my 3D bots and additional art! Why 3D? Because I'm afraid to draw >~< and it's very difficult for me to practice drawing right now (I'll learn in the distant future). And why not continue using the AI art I was already using? Because it frustrates me a lot 😭 I have VERY PRECISE ideas and the AI is not able to understand what I ask it to do, so I'm fed up! I thought it was cool, but I'm too lazy to do so much for so little when I could put all that energy into making a real 3D model and doing the art myself (how hard can it be? :3). In addition, I had a conversation with a friend AI "art", and considering how everything related to generative AI is going, I prefer to learn how to make my art for real instead of with AI because of what might happen. It may be a very strange decision considering that this is a page with chatbots, but I see chatbots as a game (in fact, I may turn some chatbots into games in the future), not a substitute for fanfics or hentai manga. It's for the user to do whatever they want, but with generative image AI... it's just another tool to do something that was already done perfectly before ┑(￣Д ￣)┍ and I don't want to use it professionally, so I'd rather spend the time I devote to finding everything I need and the work involved in creating an image with AI on learning how to make the images myself. That way, I can use everything I've learned in the future when I want to devote myself to making hentai games >:).

I may use AI to help me with silhouettes or lighting, but I prefer my handmade porn art over AI any day :D. If you skipped that whole paragraph, I don't blame you, it's just an excuse to procrastinate without feeling guilty, but if you did read it, then thank you for taking the time to read it before going to chat with Tiffany. I like to think that there are people who enjoy what I do, and I don't want to give out poor quality content (even though this bot is quite cheap and simple), so I'm going to put effort into it (or at least as much effort as my studies and work allow).

Sorry for talking so much, I got carried away. I hope to see you soon. If I make a character based on a drawing, I might just upload it, but for the ones I want, I need to do it by hand, so I won't be doing much for a while :3 I hope
creator: CritTheHits
